mapper.select:
select id,code,name,specification,unit,category_name,safety_number, upper_number,update_time,status,remark,create_time,update_time,deleted from material
and code like concat('%',#{q.code},'%')
and name like concat('%',#{q.name},'%')
and specification like concat('%',#{q.specification},'%')
and safety_number >= #{q.safetyNumberBegin}
and upper_number >= #{q.upperNumberBegin}
and deleted=0
